title: custom subitem automations with slack integration
excerpt:

posts.author: nicolepounds (Nicole Pounds)
posts.cookedHtml:
is it possible to create a custom automation for subitems where when a certain person is assigned to that subitem, it posts in slack (integration) with a message including the subitem title (not the parent item title)

also same thing for when subitem status updates to “please update”

posts.author: asharma (Ankur Sharma - Upscale (Part of The Adaptavist Group))
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Nicole!

Hope you’re doing well. Not sure if you’ve been able to find a solution to your query, but we just launched an app called Slack IntegratePlus for monday.com that let’s you do exactly what your use case is (and of course, more!)

Kindly try it out and let us know your feedback!

Thanks,
Ankur
